title: Discord Role
description: A role in Discord represents a set of permissions and visual attributes that can be assigned to guild members to control access and display hierarchy.

color.description: Integer representation of hexadecimal color code

hoist.description: Whether this role is pinned in the user listing

position.description: Position of this role (higher = more authority)

managed.description: Whether this role is managed by an integration

flags.description: Role flags combined as a bitfield

RoleTags.description: Tags indicating special properties of the role

bot_id.description: ID of the bot this role belongs to

integration_id.description: ID of the integration this role belongs to

premium_subscriber.description: Whether this is the guild's Booster role (present if true)

subscription_listing_id.description: ID of this role's subscription SKU and listing

available_for_purchase.description: Whether this role is available for purchase (present if true)

guild_connections.description: Whether this role is a guild's linked role (present if true)
